platform_usage_notes: Use ArcGIS Hub item pages, service metadata, and FeatureServer query mechanics only as platform hints.
A service URL or item id can identify a GIS layer, but it cannot decide research fit or full extraction completeness.
Legacy known_source candidates remain compatibility source priors until a route-agent consumer reads neutral platform fragments.
future_verification_hints: Resolve Hub pages to current item and service metadata.
Probe FeatureServer layer metadata, max record count, and pagination requirements before any downstream acquisition step.
Validate geometry type, layer fields, spatial coverage, and row completeness outside this platform package.
